references.why: Carry forward scene or platform style cues without locking the composition.

Hard constraints: no empty scenery without character presence, no ad poster feeling, no tourism poster feeling, no glossy fashion editorial look, no photoreal live-action look, no text, subtitle, watermark, or UI overlay
